pattern: Balance here is nothing more than two running totals -- one for even positions, one for odd -- so a single left-to-right pass settles the question.
hints: Split the digits into two groups purely by position parity: those at even indices and those at odd indices.
Sum each group separately as you scan the string once.
Compare the two sums directly -- the string is balanced exactly when they're equal.

edge_inputs.description: off by exactly one in the last digit

stress.description: random digit strings of varying even and odd length
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(2, min(size, 100))
    num = ''.join(str(rng.randint(0, 9)) for _ in range(n))
    return [num]
